sub_modules.conv1d_window: Combinational mapping from current input and stored delay samples to the five causal FIR taps.
sub_modules.conv1d_kernel_mac: Combinational fixed 5-tap multiply-accumulate using kernel weights 2, 8, 12, 8, 2.
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Combinational right-shift normalization from accumulator width to DATA_W+GAIN_W output width.
